001package entityClasses;
002
003import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;
004import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
005
006import java.util.List;
007
008import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals;
009import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse;
010import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertNotNull;
011import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertNull;
012import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue;
013
014class PostListTest {
015
016    private PostList postList;
017
018    @BeforeEach
019    void setUp() {
020        postList = new PostList();
021    }
022
023    @Test
024    void createPost_rejectsNullAndDuplicateId() {
025        assertEquals("Post is required.", postList.createPost(null));
026
027        Post p1 = new Post(1, "Title", "Body", "CSE360", "student1", false);
028        assertNull(postList.createPost(p1));
029
030        Post duplicate = new Post(1, "Other", "Other Body", "CSE360", "student2", false);
031        assertEquals("Post ID already exists.", postList.createPost(duplicate));
032    }
033
034    @Test
035    void createPost_rejectsInvalidAuthor() {
036        Post post = new Post(2, "Valid Title", "Valid body", "CSE360", "bad user", false);
037        assertEquals("Post author: ASU User ID cannot contain spaces.", postList.createPost(post));
038    }
039
040    @Test
041    void createPost_sanitizesMaliciousScriptInput() {
042        Post post = new Post(20, "<script>bad</script>", "Body <script>alert('x')</script>",
043                "CSE360", "student20", false);
044
045        assertNull(postList.createPost(post));
046
047        Post saved = postList.readPostById(20);
048        assertNotNull(saved);
049        assertEquals("&lt;script&gt;bad&lt;/script&gt;", saved.getTitle());
050        assertEquals("Body &lt;script&gt;alert(&#39;x&#39;)&lt;/script&gt;", saved.getBody());
051    }
052
053    @Test
054    void updatePost_trimsValuesAndSetsResolved() {
055        Post post = new Post(3, "Original", "Original body", "CSE360", "student3", false);
056        assertNull(postList.createPost(post));
057
058        String error = postList.updatePost(3, "  Updated  ", "  New body  ", "  cse360  ", true);
059        assertNull(error);
060
061        Post updated = postList.readPostById(3);
062        assertNotNull(updated);
063        assertEquals("Updated", updated.getTitle());
064        assertEquals("New body", updated.getBody());
065        assertEquals("cse360", updated.getCourseTag());
066        assertTrue(updated.isResolved());
067    }
068
069    @Test
070    void deletePost_returnsExpectedBoolean() {
071        assertFalse(postList.deletePost(404));
072
073        Post post = new Post(4, "Delete", "Target", "CSE360", "student4", false);
074        assertNull(postList.createPost(post));
075        assertTrue(postList.deletePost(4));
076    }
077
078    @Test
079    void setSubsetFromKeyword_supportsCaseInsensitiveSearch() {
080        postList.createPost(new Post(5, "Maven setup", "How to run tests", "CSE360", "student5", false));
081        postList.createPost(new Post(6, "JavaFX", "UI scene graph", "CSE360", "student6", false));
082
083        postList.setSubsetFromKeyword("MAVEN");
084        List<Post> subset = postList.readSubsetPosts();
085        assertEquals(1, subset.size());
086        assertEquals(5, subset.get(0).getPostId());
087
088        postList.setSubsetFromKeyword("   ");
089        assertTrue(postList.readSubsetPosts().isEmpty());
090    }
091}
